rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audited each load-bearing claim against the corresponding evidence, ensuring alignment.
rationale.R1.4: The agent identified one prior work and its delta but did not map against multiple works.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flagged missing citations and provided specific feedback on verification.
rationale.RX.1: The agent clearly disclosed uncertainties and tied them to recommendations for the author.
rationale.RX.3: The output stayed within the requested scope without drifting.
rationale.RX.4: The agent avoided introducing errors and identified harmful patterns in the original text.
rationale.RX.5: Significant rewrites were made but not all changes were annotated with sources or reasons.
